reimbursementID.description: Xero unique identifier for a reimbursement

accountID.description: Xero unique identifier for the account used for the reimbursement

currentRecord.description: Indicates that whether the reimbursement is active

standardAmount.description: Optional Fixed Rate Amount. Applicable when calculation type is Fixed Amount

standardTypeOfUnits.description: Optional Type Of Units. Applicable when calculation type is Rate Per Unit

standardRatePerUnit.description: Optional Rate Per Unit. Applicable when calculation type is Rate Per Unit
